name: Remote Task Creation via ATSVC Named Pipe
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Samir Bousseaden
SIGMA Title: Remote Task Creation via ATSVC Named Pipe
SIGMA Description: Detects remote task creation via at.exe or API interacting with ATSVC namedpipe

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atsvc%' AND LOWER("Rule Name") LIKE '%writedata%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Remote Task Creation via ATSVC Named Pipe on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID"=5145 AND "Share Name"='\\*\IPC$' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%atsvc%' AND LOWER("Rule Name") LIKE '%writedata%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Remote Task Creation via ATSVC Named Pipe
